MOTION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and there being no appearance, tentative ruling is confirmed as follows:

DEFENDANTS PAUL PASTOR, PABLO PASTOR'S MOTION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The arbitration hearing is continued to December 20, 2017 or such later date as agreed to by the parties and the arbitrator. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
